blocks.content: The snowy trail that ran through Laviette's city now had a long, deep groove, as if a giant snowball had rolled across the ground.
Rumble!
With a deafening sound reminiscent of thunder, Son Yu-jung was sent flying from one end of the city to the other.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Ugh… damn it…
Embedded between the ground and a wall, she glared forward with her head bent awkwardly.
A red-skinned demon was approaching with his hands behind his back.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: This is driving me insane.
Through her blazing Fiery Golden Eyes, Son Yu-jung saw Shirone's figure, as if she were facing an overwhelming, unstoppable truth.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Kiieeek!
Distorting her face in anger, she unleashed a threatening growl, but Shirone only clicked his tongue.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Still haven't learned your lesson?

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: What did I even do wrong?! I'm just living my life the way I want! Why the hell are you all meddling?! I came to save my friend! I don't care about this damned Hell!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's exactly the problem. You create chaos without thinking, worsening every situation.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: What nonsense are you spouting?! You act however you want too! Nane, Ymir, they all do whatever they please with their power, so why can't I?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Living the way you want,' huh…
Shirone stopped walking and looked down at Son Yu-jung.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Or is it that you don't know what you should be doing?

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: You lack conviction. You're a bomb—neither good nor evil wants to keep you around.
Her power was enough to destroy Laviette's entire city.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because you lack conviction, you're easily swayed by others' emotions. People will either try to manipulate or control you. You'll always be surrounded by those kinds of people.
Richelra, who had remained silent during the overwhelming battle, briefly showed a nervous expression.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: So what? And you're any different? What's so special about you or Buddha? Even now, I'm still wearing this damned Geingoa chain around my neck, so what's with the preaching?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You might think that way for now. Help me purify Hell. If you can find enlightenment in the process, you'll gain true freedom.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: I'm already free! I can do whatever I want! If it weren't for this damned chain!
Her fighting spirit reignited, and her body turned red-hot.
Shirone sighed deeply.
He could finally understand Nane's reasoning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'If someone with ill intent tries to exploit her, she'll become a deadly variable. I have to restrain her now.'
Son Yu-jung bared her teeth.
Grrrr!
Although she was ready to fight, she wasn't sure what more she could do against Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'What do I do? She's using some weird techniques. Honestly, this is even more annoying than Nane's sermons.'
Through her Fiery Golden Eyes, she noticed something lurking in the shadows, watching them.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'Huh?'
It was two of the Seven Generals—Ilgak, an ogre with long horns, and Baeksa, a woman with white snake-like skin.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'So that weird feeling was coming from them. If they want to fight, they should just fight. Why keep watching?'
Realizing that they had been monitoring even Shirone's thoughtful expression, Son Yu-jung saw a glimmer of hope for escape.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'Right. I was wondering why Yahweh disguised himself as a demon—he's wary of those guys.'
According to Richelra, Yahweh was the most hated being among the demons.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'I don't remember the incantation for the Geingoa chain.'
Having made up her mind, she rose shakily to her feet and shot into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Hehehe! Just try and catch me!
Even as her voice quickly faded into the distance, Shirone's expression didn't change.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Come back.
Smoke shot up like a meteor and crashed back to the ground.
A scream followed.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Aaaah! Damn it! You damn Yahweh!
Son Yu-jung, clutching the golden ring around her neck, writhed on the ground in agony.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: What the hell?! Why is this happening?!
Richelra, who was tumbling alongside her, froze in fear at the sight of Son Yu-jung's face.
Her veins were bulging, and a storm of emotions swirled in her fiery eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Son Yu-jung.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Argh! Stop it! Please stop!
His voice was small, but it felt as if the entire world was vibrating around him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll give you three seconds. One… two…
Eeeeeek!
As soon as the pain vanished, Son Yu-jung leaped up and charged at Shirone.
She landed heavily, kneeling on one knee, panting heavily.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Hah… hah…
For the first time, she saw Shirone's true form, fully manifested as Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: You… weren't even trying to hide it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yeah. You've ruined everything, as always. So now you have to help me.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: I… I don't want to… I said no!
As Shirone narrowed his eyes, Son Yu-jung flinched.
Eek!
Geingoa, a weapon that responds to the true will of those who have attained enlightenment, tightened its grip on her.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Stop! I told you not to do this!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then listen to me. From now on, you'll refrain from reckless behavior and help me with my task. Got it?
Shirone glanced at the shadowy corner.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'They're gone.'
When he had revealed himself as Yahweh, the unmistakable killing intent had filled the city, but it had vanished in an instant.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Not stopping me immediately must have been a strategic decision. Still, keeping Son Yu-jung by my side is better than letting her go.'
Just as her thoughts ended, Son Yu-jung, eyes wild, charged again at terrifying speed.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Fine! Let's die together, you bastard!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tsk.
With a simple click of his tongue, the Geingoa chain tightened, and Son Yu-jung's eyes widened.
Guh!
Even her staff was flung aside as she clutched her neck and collapsed.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: No! No way! Get this thing off me! Just kill me instead!
As Shirone watched her coldly, Son Yu-jung eventually broke down in tears.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Okay! I was wrong! I'll do whatever you say, just please stop!
Part of Shirone felt pity for her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're not like Havitz. You're still a blank slate, undecided on your path. That's probably why Nane found it regrettable.
Had it been deemed that she was beyond redemption, Nane would have eliminated her long ago.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Get up.
With a tear-streaked face, Son Yu-jung stood and wiped her eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For now, just follow my orders. You'll understand why soon enough.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Understood. So, what do I do now? Should I start by taking off my clothes?
As Son Yu-jung made a teasing gesture to undress, Shirone raised an eyebrow.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Cut it out.
Eek!
Feeling the Geingoa tightening slightly, she quickly knelt on one knee in fear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop picking up bad habits. You have a mission to change the flow of the era. Don't turn away from your responsibility.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Tch.
Son Yu-jung clicked her tongue in annoyance.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'I thought I could talk my way out of this. Turns out Yahweh's no different from those stuck-up monks.'
Shirone turned toward Magritte's castle.
She turned away.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: 'Lette must have heard by now. That makes the fortress the most dangerous place.'
Behind her, Son Yu-jung could be felt sneaking away quietly, like a cat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Son Yu-jung.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Yes? Yes!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Go to that fortress. Don't fight the demons, just follow me directly.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Understood.
Son Yu-jung replied sullenly, while Shirone spread her wings of light and soared into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Wait for me, Rian.'
As the roar of Shirone's departure echoed,
Richelra, who was strapped to Son Yu-jung's waist, shouted urgently.

blocks.speaker: Richelra
blocks.content: This is our chance! Let's escape quickly! While we're at it, let's head straight for the flames of hell and purify—Ow! Owwww!
In a burst of frustration over all the indignities she had suffered, Son Yu-jung grabbed his nose and twisted it hard.
Blood dripped from Richelra's nose.

blocks.speaker: Richelra
blocks.content: If we could escape, I'd have done it already. Even from a hundred thousand miles away, she'd hunt me down.
In the end… they were caught.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Arghhhh! This is driving me nuts! I'm going to lose my mind!
As she leapt into the sky, a trail of smoke stretched behind her like the tail of a comet.
Meanwhile, back in the command tent, the atmosphere was so oppressive from the killing intent radiating off the Seven Generals that it was hard to breathe.

blocks.speaker: Execution Commander Itaka
blocks.content: Are you saying Yupi was Yahweh all along?
Her pupils absorbed all light, and her hair writhed like a living thing.

blocks.speaker: Ik
blocks.content: One-horned

blocks.speaker: Ik
blocks.content: I saw it with my own eyes. We lost contact after she entered the city, and now it turns out she was pulling this kind of trick.

blocks.speaker: Moo-nom
blocks.content: But what's the reason? Why would Yahweh bother disguising himself as a demon and fighting intruders?

blocks.speaker: Kimara
blocks.content: Most likely… it was the Grand Duke's orders.

blocks.speaker: Kimara
blocks.content: Currently, the head of the Fire Management Company is staying in the city. And it seems the Grand Duke is inclined to protect Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Lette is?
Itaka's hair stretched rapidly toward Magritte's fortress.
Her eyes widened, and for the first time, she rose from the executioner's seat.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Mother of Hell, welcome.
As everyone turned their heads, the tent flaps opened, and Lette appeared.
All seven generals adopted the same posture as Lette took in the mood of the room.

blocks.speaker: Lette
blocks.content: Such an oppressive atmosphere. What business could require all seven generals to exude this level of killing intent?
Everyone waited for Itaka's response, but she remained silent, unwilling to risk disrespect.

blocks.speaker: Lette
blocks.content: 'The Grand Duke… seems to be protecting Yahweh.'
Expecting the Seven Generals' reaction, Lette spoke coldly.

blocks.speaker: Lette
blocks.content: Explain. I've already informed the Grand Duke, and there will be no more mercy.
Kimara trembled, sensing a completely different aura from the Lette they had encountered at the fortress.

blocks.speaker: Lette
blocks.content: Fine. Let's start by eliminating the Execution Commander.
As Lette raised her hand, the purifying flames of Hell blazed intensely.

blocks.speaker: Lette
blocks.content: 'The Mother of Hell.'
While all demons inherit Satan's traits, Lette has the ability to reduce any demon to their primal essence.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Yahweh…
Before her elbow could fully extend, Itaka fell to the ground and raised her head.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Yahweh deceived us.
The purifying flames vanished.
Meanwhile, Rian let out a guttural scream.
Arghhhhh!
The Chains of Gehenna erupted from his body, as though trying to devour him whole.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: Endure it. You made the choice. This is the fastest method we have.
Normally, binding the Chains of Gehenna to 〈Idea〉 would take three full days.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'Thus, they used a random-sequence method—continuously drawing out the chains and spinning the karma code until a connection was established.'
Ughhhhh…
Hearing Rian's groans subside, Magritte felt a shiver of pure awe.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'What an extraordinary body.'
The pain Rian was enduring was greater than anything even the denizens of Hell had experienced.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'Humans truly are strange creatures.'
How could anyone not resent Shirone, who had subjected Rian to such unreasonable suffering?

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'Hang on, Shirone! I'm coming!'
With chains wrapped tightly around his entire body, Rian's eyes burned with fiery determination.
This time, even he couldn't suppress his scream.
Arghhhhh!
With a metallic grinding sound, the chain unraveled from his hand and coiled around the handle of the great sword, merging with it.
As 〈Idea〉 glowed a fierce red, Magritte exclaimed in awe.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: It worked!
Had it been any ordinary weapon, it would have melted in seconds, but 〈Idea〉 remained unbroken.

blocks.speaker: Ozent
blocks.content: It doesn't shatter.
That was Ozent's conviction.
Clutching the handle of the great sword tightly, Rian felt the explosive heat coursing through it.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: Wait! Not here!
Before he could finish, 〈Idea〉 shot forward, embedding itself in the wall of the lab.
Huff!
Rian's eyes widened as an immense energy surged through the chain connection.
Yaaaahhhhh!
The molten, glowing wall evaporated completely, exposing the underground landscape.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'Incredible purifying power.'
Magritte trembled.

blocks.speaker: Magritte
blocks.content: 'It's possible. With this, we can cleanse the true nature of negative karma.'
In other words…
